calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Continued To Nov-19-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Nov-19-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-01-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Younessian, Plaintiff in pro per and moving party, (415-877-1234) / Mark J. Romeo, Esq. of Law Offices of Mark J. Romeo, (415-395-9315), for Adam Kahn, Defendant and opposing party

Court clarifies the tentative ruling to parties. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN's Motion To Vacate Dismissal is DENIED. Plaintiff is seeking reconsideration, which is untimely. Plaintiff also fails to meet the burden under both CCP 473(b) and CCP 1008. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Mark Romeo, 235 Montgomery street suite410, San Francisco, Ca 94104 (415)395-9315 for Adam Kahn, the moving party/ Michael Younessian (Pro Per) (415)879-1234 the opposing party.

Having held discussion the Court adopts the Tentative Agreement as follows: DEFENDANT ADAM KAHN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. This issue has already been resolved in Bankruptcy Court. See Bankruptcy Court order of February 11, 2008. Request for Judicial Notice is granted. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported, (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ADAM KAHN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. First Amended Complaint filed May 28, 2013. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Continued To May-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: michael younessian, plaintiff in pro per.
mark j. romero, esq., 415.395.9315, for defendant adam kahn.

RULING: no argument. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ADAM KAHN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Transferred to Department 501 to be heard on May 30, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
